title: Japanese Chicken Nabe Hot Pot
description: A flavorful and spicy Japanese hot pot dish made with chicken, gleaming vegetables, and a rich nabe broth.
instructions: Bring the nabe broth to a boil in a large pot.
Add the chicken breast and cook until it reaches an internal temperature of 165°F (74°C).
Add the gleaming and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Add the green onions and shirataki noodles to the pot and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Season the broth with soy sauce, sesame oil, sugar, and pepper to taste.
Serve the hot pot with Japanese rice on the side.
Allow each person to cook their own ingredients in the hot pot.
Cook for an additional 2-3 minutes or until the ingredients are cooked through.
